description: You are investigating a suspect for evidence spoliation (intentional destruction of evidence). The suspect claims they simply deleted some old files, but you suspect they used a secure shredding utility to overwrite the file payloads with zeroes or 0xFF patterns. Conduct a forensic investigation in Autopsy by creating case 'Spoliation_Investigation_2024' (number 'INV-WIPE-001') and analyzing the disk image /home/ga/evidence/wiped_evidence.dd using the 'File Type Identification' ingest module. Identify all deleted user files and classify their payload condition as 'WIPED_ZERO' (0x00), 'WIPED_FF' (0xFF), or 'INTACT'. Export a pipe-delimited inventory to /home/ga/Reports/wiping_analysis.csv using the header 'FILENAME|SIZE_BYTES|PAYLOAD_STATUS'. Additionally, provide an analytical summary at /home/ga/Reports/spoliation_summary.txt including the total number of deleted files analyzed, the count for each status category, and a brief assessment of whether intentional data destruction occurred.
